frames.name: Diplomatic Meeting Coverage
frames.description: Frames the story as a standard bilateral diplomatic meeting between allies, emphasizing the personal relationship between Trump and Merz
frames.emphasis: Trump calling Merz a 'friend,' their countries' strong relationship, and discussion of trade deals

frames.name: War Context Frame
frames.description: Emphasizes this as Trump's first meeting with a world leader since the Iran conflict began, highlighting the military situation
frames.emphasis: Iran's military capabilities being 'knocked out,' the ongoing nature of the conflict, and its impact on diplomacy

frames.name: European Unity/Division Frame
frames.description: Focuses on varying levels of European support for U.S. actions and diplomatic tensions within the alliance
frames.emphasis: Mixed European support, criticism of UK and Spain as 'uncooperative,' while praising Germany's cooperation

frames.name: Strategic Policy Discussion Frame
frames.description: Presents the meeting as substantive policy discussions on multiple fronts including Iran, Ukraine, and trade
frames.emphasis: Merz pushing for long-term Middle East strategy, Ukraine territorial integrity, and 'common approach' to regional security

outlierPerspectives: DW's focus on Merz's diplomatic strategy of 'gently pushing' Trump on issues while maintaining alliance unity
Trump's claim that he 'might have forced Israel's hand' rather than being pulled into war by Israel
Detailed coverage of Trump's criticism of UK base access denial and energy/immigration policies
missingContext: Timeline and escalation details of the Iran conflict
Specific nature of the military operations being described
Details about the previous ceasefire proposal that 'sparked heated response from European partners'
Clarification of Trump's claim about 'settling eight wars'
Economic implications of the ongoing conflict
Congressional or domestic political reaction to the war
